name: Tom Larsson
title: JUNIOR FULLSTACK DEVELOPER
profile_summary: Fullstack developer focused on TypeScript, React, and backend development. Beyond my education, I have practical experience setting up Linux environments and integrating real-time data into personal projects. Seeking an internship (LIA) position (w.35–48) in a team that values technical precision and modern development workflows.

tt_pulse.title: TT-Pulse
tt_pulse.subtitle: 2025 - Ongoing (Personal project)
tt_pulse.description: A system built to collect and visualize system data and Git activity in real-time.
points: Backend: Developed agents in Node.js running on Linux servers to collect statistics and system health.
Integration: Set up data flows to Supabase (PostgreSQL) and used real-time listeners for immediate updates.
Frontend: Built a dashboard in Next.js showing collected data in real-time with clear graphs and logs.
Functionality: Implemented logic to mask sensitive data and created simple triggers for system alerts.

ttdevs.title: ttdevs.com
ttdevs.subtitle: 2025 - Ongoing (Personal project)
ttdevs.description: Personal platform built to learn modern web development and performance optimization.
points: Used Next.js and TypeScript to build a stable and type-safe application.
Optimized the site for fast loading and good discoverability through techniques like SSR and ISR.

education.description: Focus on modern web development, component-based architecture, and backend integrations.

operator.title: Operator (Technical Problem Solving)
operator.description: Worked with practical troubleshooting and optimization of processes in an environment with high requirements for accuracy. Experience following complex instructions and solving technical hurdles under time pressure.

sales.title: Sales (Operations & Support)
sales.description: Handled daily operations and provided technical support for simple system errors. Trained in quickly prioritizing tasks and solving problems directly on-site.

outside.football: Hammarby Football: Passionate supporter who appreciates the community around the sport.
